environment.ffmpeg: ffmpeg version 8.1 Copyright (c) 2000-2026 the FFmpeg developers

runs.label: direct_python_temporal_ablation_chunk
runs.observation: crashed during MLX Metal device initialization with NSRangeException before returning JSON

runs.command: uv run python scripts/run_local_track_a_experiments.py track_a_chunk ...12 items...
runs.label: single_process_track_a_chunk_12_items_without_clear
runs.observation: no JSON output after more than two minutes; process dropped near idle CPU and had to be terminated

runs.command: uv run python scripts/run_local_track_a_experiments.py track_a_chunk ...12 items...
runs.label: single_process_track_a_chunk_12_items_with_clear
runs.observation: after adding gc.collect() plus mx.clear_cache() between items, the full 12-item run still produced no JSON after more than two minutes and had to be terminated

runs.command: uv run python scripts/run_local_track_a_experiments.py track_a_chunk ...4 items...
runs.label: single_process_track_a_chunk_4_items_with_clear
runs.observation: returned valid JSON for four items on the same stack after the cache-clear patch

summary.adopted_operating_rule: Use uv run plus subprocess chunking for Track A semantics on this machine; do not treat the long-lived single-process path as stable yet.
